mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO SEOUL_BIKE ( RENTAL_DATE, RENTAL_OFFICE_NO, RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME, RENTAL_CODE, GENDER, AGE_GROUP, NUM_OF_USES, EXERCISE_AMOUNT, CARBON_AMOUNT, DISTANCE, USAGE_MINUTE ) VALUES ( TO_DATE(#{item.rentalDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{item.rentalOfficeNo}, #{item.rentalOfficeName}, #{item.rentalCode}, #{item.gender}, #{item.ageGroup}, #{item.numOfUses}, #{item.exerciseAmount}, #{item.carbonAmount}, #{item.distance}, #{item.usageMinute} )
SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SEOUL_BIKE ORDER BY RENTAL_DATE DESC
SELECT NVL(SUM(NUM_OF_USES), 0) AS totalUses, NVL(SUM(DISTANCE), 0) AS totalDistance, NVL(SUM(USAGE_MINUTE), 0) AS totalUsageMinute FROM SEOUL_BIKE

SELECT AGE_GROUP AS label, SUM(NUM_OF_USES) AS value FROM SEOUL_BIKE
AND RENTAL_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND RENTAL_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND UPPER(GENDER) = UPPER(#{gender})
AND RENTAL_CODE = #{rentalCode}
AND RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME = #{keyword}
GROUP BY AGE_GROUP ORDER BY CASE AGE_GROUP WHEN '~10대' THEN 1 WHEN '20대' THEN 2 WHEN '30대' THEN 3 WHEN '40대' THEN 4 WHEN '50대' THEN 5 WHEN '60대' THEN 6 WHEN '70대이상' THEN 7 WHEN '기타' THEN 8 ELSE 99 END
SELECT RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME FROM OFFICE_LIST WHERE RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' ORDER BY RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM SEOUL_BIKE
AND RENTAL_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND RENTAL_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY RENTAL_DATE ASC
SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'MM')) AS month, SUM(NUM_OF_USES) AS totalUses FROM SEOUL_BIKE WHERE TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'YYYY') = #{year} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'MM') ORDER BY month

SELECT label, value FROM ( SELECT
NVL(UPPER(GENDER), '미지정') TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME AGE_GROUP RENTAL_CODE TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AS label, NVL(
SUM ROUND(AVG COUNT SUM
(
NUM_OF_USES DISTANCE CARBON_AMOUNT EXERCISE_AMOUNT USAGE_MINUTE NUM_OF_USES
) , 2) , 0) AS value FROM SEOUL_BIKE
AND RENTAL_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND RENTAL_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
/* [수정] 필터링 시에도 DB 값을 UPPER로 변환하여 파라미터(F/M)와 비교 */
AND UPPER(GENDER) = UPPER(#{gender})
AND AGE_GROUP = #{ageGroup}
AND RENTAL_CODE = #{rentalCode}
AND RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
GROUP BY
NVL(UPPER(GENDER), '미지정') TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME AGE_GROUP RENTAL_CODE TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
) ORDER BY
value label
DESC ASC
OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT CASE WHEN UPPER(GENDER) = 'F' THEN '여성' WHEN UPPER(GENDER) = 'M' THEN '남성' ELSE '기타/미지정' END AS label, SUM(NUM_OF_USES) AS value FROM SEOUL_BIKE
AND RENTAL_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND RENTAL_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME = #{keyword}
GROUP BY CASE WHEN UPPER(GENDER) = 'F' THEN '여성' WHEN UPPER(GENDER) = 'M' THEN '남성' ELSE '기타/미지정' END

SELECT NVL(RENTAL_CODE, '미지정') AS label, SUM(NUM_OF_USES) AS value FROM SEOUL_BIKE
AND RENTAL_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND RENTAL_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME = #{keyword}
GROUP BY NVL(RENTAL_CODE, '미지정') ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'DY') AS dayOfWeek, SUM(NUM_OF_USES) AS totalUsage FROM SEOUL_BIKE GROUP BY TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'DY'), TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'D') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(RENTAL_DATE, 'D')
